message:
fix: add no_history column to embedded Dolt base schemas (PR #2632)

The migration (0023) handles existing DBs, but new databases created from
the base schema were missing the no_history column, causing INSERT failures.

Co-Authored-By: maphew <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS issues (
     original_size INT,
     sender VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '',
     ephemeral TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
+    no_history TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
     wisp_type VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '',
     pinned TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
     is_template TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,

@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wisps (
     original_size INT,
     sender VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '',
     ephemeral TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
+    no_history TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
     wisp_type VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT '',
     pinned TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
     is_template TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
